timingInterpretationPolicy.guidance: When timingInterpretation.selectedTiming.scopeClass is narrow-hot-path, deltaPercent remains a phase-specific diagnostic. Claimability evaluates timingInterpretation.headlineProcessWall.deltaPercent when that end-to-end metric is available.

workloads.name: workgroup-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Workgroup-atomic compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf. Doe runs native MSL via MTLComputeCommandEncoder, bypassing Tint compilation entirely.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe dispatches pre-compiled MSL via MTLComputeCommandEncoder, bypassing Tint compilation entirely. Both sides execute the same atomic workgroup reduction logic.

timingNormalization.note: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

selectedTiming.note: Selected timing measures the comparable operation scope. headlineProcessWall adds process startup and harness overhead for the timed command.

headlineProcessWall.note: Uses timed command process wall normalized by commandRepeat and timingNormalizationDivisor. This is the end-to-end ranking view for one comparable workload unit.

workloads.name: workgroup-non-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Non-atomic workgroup compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf non-atomic variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe dispatches pre-compiled MSL; Dawn routes through Tint->MSL. Both sides execute the same non-atomic workgroup reduction logic.

timingNormalization.note: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

selectedTiming.note: Selected timing measures the comparable operation scope. headlineProcessWall adds process startup and harness overhead for the timed command.

headlineProcessWall.note: Uses timed command process wall normalized by commandRepeat and timingNormalizationDivisor. This is the end-to-end ranking view for one comparable workload unit.

workloads.name: shader-compile pipeline stress
workloads.description: Shader robustness pipeline stress aligned with Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf (MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray, f32, 512x512x512).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe dispatches pre-compiled MSL matmul kernel; Dawn routes through Tint->MSL. Measures steady-state dispatch throughput, not compile time.

timingNormalization.note: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

selectedTiming.note: Selected timing measures the comparable operation scope. headlineProcessWall adds process startup and harness overhead for the timed command.

headlineProcessWall.note: Uses timed command process wall normalized by commandRepeat and timingNormalizationDivisor. This is the end-to-end ranking view for one comparable workload unit.

workloads.name: dispatch fallback contract
workloads.description: Comparable dispatch benchmark exercising the builtin fallback dispatch command path.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict comparable Apple-Metal dispatch contract after Dawn delegate plain-dispatch execution parity fix; both sides execute the same fallback dispatch stream with per-dispatch normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Strict comparable Apple-Metal dispatch contract: normalize per fallback dispatch operation.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Parity promotion complete for the Apple Metal lane.

selectedTiming.note: Selected timing measures the comparable operation scope. headlineProcessWall adds process startup and harness overhead for the timed command.

headlineProcessWall.note: Uses timed command process wall normalized by commandRepeat and timingNormalizationDivisor. This is the end-to-end ranking view for one comparable workload unit.

workloads.name: dispatch grid contract
workloads.description: Comparable dispatch contract exercising non-trivial 3D dispatch grid shapes through the fallback dispatch command path.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict comparable Apple-Metal dispatch grid contract after Dawn delegate plain-dispatch execution parity fix; both sides execute the same 3-dispatch grid sequence with dispatch-count normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Strict comparable Apple-Metal dispatch grid contract: normalize across 600 repeated dispatch operations.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Parity promotion complete for the Apple Metal lane.

selectedTiming.note: Selected timing measures the comparable operation scope. headlineProcessWall adds process startup and harness overhead for the timed command.

headlineProcessWall.note: Uses timed command process wall normalized by commandRepeat and timingNormalizationDivisor. This is the end-to-end ranking view for one comparable workload unit.

workloads.name: zero-initialize workgroup memory (256)
workloads.description: Compute workload aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest workgroupSize=256 variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe dispatches pre-compiled MSL zero-init kernel; Dawn routes through Tint->MSL. Same workgroup memory access pattern on both sides.

timingNormalization.note: Both sides run repeat=50 dispatches per sample via the kernel_dispatch command repeat field. Divisors are symmetric at 1.0; per-dispatch timing is implicit in the repeat count.

selectedTiming.note: Selected timing measures the comparable operation scope. headlineProcessWall adds process startup and harness overhead for the timed command.

headlineProcessWall.note: Uses timed command process wall normalized by commandRepeat and timingNormalizationDivisor. This is the end-to-end ranking view for one comparable workload unit.

workloads.name: copy buffer-to-texture contract
workloads.description: Comparable copy contract covering buffer-to-texture transfer path.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict comparable on Apple Metal after Dawn-side copy ABI parity fixes; both sides execute the same buffer-to-texture command stream with per-copy normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Strict comparable Apple-Metal copy contract: normalize per buffer-to-texture copy command sequence across 400 repeated copies.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Parity promotion complete for the Apple Metal lane.

selectedTiming.note: Selected timing measures the comparable operation scope. headlineProcessWall adds process startup and harness overhead for the timed command.

workloads.name: copy protocol contract
workloads.description: Comparable mixed protocol benchmark combining sampler, copy, barrier, diagnostics, and texture lifecycle checks.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict comparable on Apple Metal after native Metal pipeline_async diagnostics accounting parity fixes; both sides execute the same mixed protocol command sequence with cycle normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Strict comparable Apple-Metal mixed protocol contract: normalize across one full protocol cycle.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Parity promotion complete for the Apple Metal lane.

selectedTiming.note: Selected timing measures the comparable operation scope. headlineProcessWall adds process startup and harness overhead for the timed command.

workloads.name: copy texture-to-buffer contract
workloads.description: Comparable copy contract covering texture-to-buffer transfer path.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict comparable on Apple Metal after Dawn-side copy ABI parity fixes; claimability uses headline process wall because delegate operation timing undercounts end-to-end texture-to-buffer completion. The Apple Metal lane uses 2000 repeats to reduce tail volatility under aggregate lane pressure.

timingNormalization.note: Strict comparable Apple-Metal copy contract: normalize per texture-to-buffer copy command sequence at 2000 repeats to stabilize headline process wall claimability.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Parity promotion complete for the Apple Metal lane.

selectedTiming.note: Selected timing measures the comparable operation scope. headlineProcessWall adds process startup and harness overhead for the timed command.

headlineProcessWall.note: Uses timed command process wall normalized by commandRepeat and timingNormalizationDivisor. This is the end-to-end ranking view for one comparable workload unit.

workloads.name: surface full presentation contract
workloads.description: Comparable surface lifecycle contract covering capabilities/configure/acquire/present/unconfigure/release operations.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict comparable on Apple Metal after Dawn-side CAMetalLayer surface creation, presentable BGRA8Unorm swapchain format, and phase-aligned surface timing instrumentation.

timingNormalization.note: Strict comparable Apple-Metal surface contract: normalize per full presentation cycle across 100 repeated cycles.
